title: static field
text: static field A field whose content is shared by all occurrences of the entity. Its value can only be modified in ProcScript, and the modification does not affect the modification status of the occurrence. It is defined with the Is Static property and is useful for fields that act as entity controls. Synonyms: boilerplate field (pre-Uniface 10) Related Links field A development object that represents a unit of data in an entity. It usually represents a column in a database table, but it can represent data that is not stored, such as a derived field or a control. Its associated properties define the way it is stored, displayed, and behaves. structure editor function A request for the structure editor to perform the indicated action. non-database field Any field that is not stored in the database. Non-database fields can be defined for a modeled entity or in a component entity. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
